_comment: Note: userPromptSubmitted is intentionally omitted. Per docs.github.com/en/copilot/reference/hooks-configuration, Copilot does not consume hook stdout for that event ('Output processed: No'), so route-prompt.sh's natural-language routing would be a silent no-op. Claude Code, which does honor UserPromptSubmit stdout, still runs route-prompt via .claude/settings.json. In Copilot, the sessionStart hook now ships a workflow-routing primer instead.
